app.name: Kammer
app.tagline: Your communities, gathered in one place.
nav.label: Main navigation
home.title: Home
home.empty.title: All quiet for now
home.empty.body: Posts and events from your communities will show up here.
events.empty.title: No upcoming events
events.empty.body: When one of your communities plans something, you'll find it here.
events.rsvp.label: Are you going?
events.slots.title: Signup slots
events.slots.empty: No slots to sign up for yet.
events.detail.commentsLocked: Comments are closed on this event.
events.form.title: Title
events.picker.subtitle: Choose the group to add the event to.
events.picker.emptyBody: None of your groups have events turned on yet.
groups.empty.title: No groups yet
groups.empty.body: The groups you belong to will be listed here.
notifications.empty.title: Nothing new
notifications.empty.body: You're all caught up. New notifications will land here.
notifications.error.title: Couldn't load notifications
notifications.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
you.title: You
you.accounts.title: Your communities
you.accounts.description: You're signed in to these communities. Each one stays on its own server.
you.appearance.title: Appearance
you.language.title: Language
signin.brand.tagline: Your communities, gathered in one place.
signin.instance.title: Add your community
signin.instance.description: Enter the web address of the community you belong to.
signin.instance.label: Community address
signin.instance.error.invalid: That doesn't look like a web address.
signin.instance.error.unreachable: We couldn't find a community at that address. Check it and try again.
signin.email.title: Sign in to {name}
signin.email.description: We'll email you a sign-in link. No password needed.
signin.email.label: Email
signin.email.error: We couldn't send the link. Please try again.
signin.confirm.title: Check your email
signin.confirm.description: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device — or paste it below.
signin.confirm.pasteHint: Paste the link from the email, or just the code at the end of it.
signin.confirm.resent: A new link is on its way.
signin.confirm.error.invalidPaste: That doesn't look like a sign-in link or code.
signin.confirm.error.exchange: That sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
signin.deeplink.title: Signing you in…
signin.deeplink.error.title: That link didn't work
signin.deeplink.error.body: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired.
register.title: Create an account
register.description: Just your name and email — we'll send you a sign-in link. No password needed.
register.error.displayName: Enter the name others should see.
register.error.email: Check the email address — it may be invalid or already have an account.
register.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
register.error.generic: We couldn't create the account. Please try again.
invite.title: You're invited to {name}
invite.realNames: This community asks members to use their full, real name.
invite.invalid.title: This invitation is no longer valid
invite.invalid.body: It may have expired, been revoked, or already been used up.
invite.error.title: Couldn't load this invitation
invite.error.body: Check your connection and try again.
invite.accept.error.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
invite.accept.error.emailMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
invite.accept.error.generic: We couldn't accept the invitation. Please try again.
invite.newHere: New here? You'll create an account with just your email.
home.filter.label: Filter by community
home.failed.auth: You've been signed out of {name}. Sign in again to see it here.
feed.report.title: Report to the moderators
feed.report.placeholder: What's wrong? The moderators see exactly what you write.
feed.report.thanks: Thanks — the moderators will take a look.
feed.reauth: You've been signed out of this community. Sign in again to keep up to date.
feed.empty.title: No posts yet
feed.empty.body: Be the first to share something with this group.
feed.error.title: Couldn't load this feed
feed.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
feed.error.authBody: Sign in to this community again to view its feed.
feed.instanceMissing.title: Community not found
feed.instanceMissing.body: This community isn't in your list anymore.
feed.sort.label: Sort posts
feed.poll.label: Poll
files.title: Files
files.empty.title: No files yet
files.empty.body: Upload a file or create a folder to get started.
files.error.title: Couldn't load files
files.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
files.versions.title: Versions of {name}
groups.title: Groups
groups.error.title: Couldn't load groups
groups.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
group.joinRequested: Request sent — an admin will review it.
group.notifications.label: Notifications
members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from the community and all its groups?
members.error.title: Couldn't load the members
members.error.body: You may not have access to this directory.
invites.title: Invites
invites.description: Share a link, or send one straight to an email address. Joining by an invite adds the person to the community.
invites.empty.title: No active invites
invites.empty.body: Create a link to bring people in.
invites.error.title: Couldn't load invites
invites.error.body: Only community admins can manage invites.
you.notifications.title: Notifications
you.notifications.unsupported.title: Not supported in this browser
you.notifications.unsupported.body: This browser doesn't support push notifications.
you.notifications.wrongOrigin.body: Push notifications for {name} can only be managed from that server's own address — this browser tab is on a different one.
you.notifications.wrongOrigin.visit: Open {name} to manage push notifications there
you.notifications.serverDisabled.title: Push notifications aren't turned on
you.notifications.serverDisabled.body: This server hasn't configured push notifications yet.
you.notifications.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How you appear to other members on {name}.
profile.contact.title: Contact details
profile.contact.description: Each detail has its own audience — hidden, members, or admins only.
profile.communityFields.title: Profile in {name}
profile.communityFields.description: Fields this community asks its members about.
profile.communityFields.missing: Please fill in the required fields.
profile.error.title: Couldn't load your profile
profile.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
profile.emailChange.title: Email address
profile.emailChange.description: Signing in and emails from {name} use this address. Changing it sends a confirmation link to the new address first.
profile.emailChange.sent: Almost there — we've emailed a confirmation link to {email}. Nothing changes until you open it.
profile.emailChange.error.invalid: That doesn't look like an email address.
profile.emailChange.error.rateLimited: Too many email-change requests. Please wait a while and try again.
profile.emailChange.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
confirmEmail.title: Confirming your new email address…
confirmEmail.ready.title: Confirm your new email address
confirmEmail.ready.body: Finish changing the email address for your account.
confirmEmail.retry.title: Couldn't reach the server
confirmEmail.retry.body: The link is still valid — check your connection and try again.
confirmEmail.success.title: Email changed
confirmEmail.success.body: Your email address is now {email}. Your other devices on this app were signed out and need to sign in again.
confirmEmail.error.title: That link didn't work
confirmEmail.error.body: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
confirmEmail.notSignedIn.title: Sign in first
confirmEmail.notSignedIn.body: Confirming your new address requires this app to be signed in to this community. Sign in, then open the link from the email again.
account.title: Data & account
account.description: Your data and your account on {name}.
account.export.title: Export your data
account.export.description: Download everything {name} stores about you — one zip with your data and your uploaded files.
account.export.error: The export failed. Please try again.
account.delete.title: Delete your account
account.delete.description: This removes your account and personal data from {name} and cannot be undone. Content you wrote stays, shown as “Deleted user”. Download your data first if you want it.
account.delete.confirmLabel: Type your email address ({email}) to confirm
account.delete.error.mismatch: That doesn't match your account's email address.
account.delete.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Everything signed in to your account on {name}. Revoke anything you don't recognize.
devices.error.title: Couldn't load your devices
devices.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
manage.moderation.title: Moderation
manage.moderation.reports.title: Reports
manage.moderation.bans.title: Banned members
manage.moderation.ban.title: Ban a member
manage.moderation.ban.confirm: Ban {name}? They are removed from the community and their email can't rejoin until the ban is lifted.
manage.moderation.ban.errorAlreadyBanned: That member's email is already banned.
manage.moderation.ban.errorReason: The reason can't be longer than 2,000 characters.
manage.moderation.audit.title: Audit log
manage.moderation.audit.empty.title: No audit events yet
manage.moderation.audit.empty.body: Admin actions in this community will show up here.
manage.error.title: Something went wrong
manage.error.forbiddenBody: You don't have permission to manage this.
manage.community.title: Community settings
manage.community.name: Name
manage.community.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Changing this changes every link to the community.
manage.community.listedOnInstance: List this community on the instance landing page
manage.community.requireRealNames: Ask members to use their full, real name
manage.community.requireRealNamesHint: Shown when joining; it's a statement, not technically verified.
manage.community.error.name: The name can't be blank or longer than 100 characters.
manage.community.error.slug: That web address is taken or invalid.
manage.instance.title: Instance settings
manage.instance.subtitle: Operator-only. Applies to the whole instance.
manage.instance.forbiddenBody: Only instance operators can view instance settings.
manage.instance.name: Instance name
manage.instance.storagePolicyOption.quot: Quota — per-space limits, uploads blocked at cap
manage.instance.minimizedEmailsHint: Digest emails carry only counts and a link — no post text or author names. Auth and RSVP emails are already minimal and unaffected. Off by default; most communities prefer the extra context.
manage.group.title: Group settings
manage.group.name: Name
manage.group.features.title: Features
manage.group.archived: This group is archived — read-only and hidden from active lists.

availability.title: Availability
availability.new.title: New availability poll
availability.answer.label: Your answer for {date}
availability.empty.title: No open polls
availability.empty.body: Find a date that works for everyone — start a poll.

availability.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.

assignments.empty.title: No tasks yet

assignments.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
assignments.detail.error.title: Couldn't load this task
assignments.detail.error.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.

decisions.new.withVote: Attach a For / Against / Abstain vote

decisions.empty.title: No decisions recorded
decisions.empty.body: Raise a motion to start the register.

search.idle.body: Find posts, comments, events and files across every community you're in.

guest.rsvp.confirm.success.title: You're confirmed
guest.rsvp.confirm.success.bodyNamed: Thanks, {name} — we've recorded your RSVP and emailed you a link to manage it.
guest.rsvp.confirm.success.body: We've recorded your RSVP and emailed you a link to manage it.
guest.claim.confirm.title: Confirming your signup…
guest.claim.confirm.error.title: That link didn't work
guest.claim.confirm.error.body: This signup link is invalid or has expired.
guest.claim.confirm.full.title: This slot just filled up
guest.claim.confirm.full.body: Someone else signed up for this slot first. Check the event for other open slots.
guest.claim.confirm.success.title: You're signed up
guest.claim.confirm.success.bodyNamed: Thanks, {name} — you're on the list, and we've emailed you a link to manage it.
guest.claim.confirm.success.body: You're on the list, and we've emailed you a link to manage it.

guest.comment.confirm.error.body: This comment link is invalid or has expired.
guest.comment.confirm.success.title: Comment submitted
guest.comment.confirm.success.bodyNamed: Thanks, {name} — your comment is awaiting approval, and we've emailed you a link to manage it.

guest.manage.title: Manage your details
guest.manage.error.title: That link didn't work
guest.manage.error.body: This management link is invalid, has expired, or your data has already been erased.
guest.manage.mutation.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
guest.manage.erase.confirm.title: Erase everything?
guest.manage.erase.confirm.body: This permanently deletes your RSVPs, signups, comments, and subscriptions tied to this link. This can't be undone.
guest.manage.erased.title: Your data has been erased
guest.manage.erased.body: Everything tied to this link has been permanently deleted.
newsletter.confirm.title: Confirming your subscription…

newsletter.confirm.error.body: This subscription link is invalid or has expired.
newsletter.confirm.success.title: You're subscribed
newsletter.confirm.success.bodyNamed: Thanks, {name} — we've emailed you a link to manage your subscription.

legal.error.title: That page isn't available
legal.error.body: This page hasn't been published yet.
setup.error.title: Couldn't check setup status
setup.error.body: Setup failed — check the values and try again.
setup.alreadyDone.title: This instance is already set up
setup.alreadyDone.body: Setup has already been completed. Sign in to continue.
setup.token.title: Set up your instance
setup.token.label: Setup token
setup.token.placeholder: Paste the token from the server logs
setup.token.hint: The token was printed to the server logs when this instance started.
setup.token.error: That setup token is invalid or has expired. Check the server logs for the current one.
setup.operator.description: Name the instance and create your operator account.

setup.community.name: Your first community's name
setup.community.demoData.label: Create a demo community
setup.community.demoData.description: A small sandbox with example posts, a poll, and an event. Removable with one click later.
setup.done.title: Your instance is ready
setup.done.magicLinkSent: We emailed you a sign-in link — receiving it confirms your email delivery works.
setup.done.magicLinkFailed: Your sign-in email could not be sent — check the SMTP settings and request a new link on the sign-in page. Setup itself succeeded.
setup.done.inviteHint: Anyone with this link can join {community}.
setup.done.legalHint: Before opening the doors: publish your privacy policy and imprint.
